message:
refactor(build): simplify to native + wasi (AOT) targets

Unify build to two main paths:
- native: produces both native binary AND WASM from native_main_embed.zig
- wasi: AOT sandbox with WAMR for Docker-like isolation

Major changes:
- Remove old WASM code paths (wasm_main.zig, wasm_main_static.zig, etc.)
- Remove WASI polyfills (wasi.zig, wasi_*.zig) - native path uses Zig polyfills
- Simplify build.zig from ~1700 lines to ~400 lines
- Register fs.readvSync/writevSync (already implemented but not exposed)
- Implement real gzip/deflate compression using vendored libdeflate

The native-embed path uses native Zig polyfills for all Node.js APIs.
The wasi path uses WAMR for sandboxed AOT execution.
